# netbox_prefix (Data Source)

Fetches a prefix from NetBox by CIDR.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `prefix` (String) The CIDR notation of the prefix to look up (e.g., 10.0.0.0/24).

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the prefix.
- `id` (Number) The ID of the prefix.
- `is_pool` (Boolean) Whether this prefix is used as an allocation pool.
- `mark_utilized` (Boolean) Whether to mark this prefix as fully utilized.
- `tenant` (Number) The tenant ID associated with the prefix.
- `vrf` (Number) The VRF ID associated with the prefix.
